section.title: Experience
section.subtitle: Professional roles, responsibilities, and measurable impact

roles.title: Operations Data Analyst
roles.summary: Built automated data pipelines, dashboards, and analytical frameworks to improve operational efficiency, conversion performance, and reporting accuracy across multi-city operations.
responsibilities: Built automated reporting pipelines using SQL, Python, Power Automate, and Google Apps Script, enabling near real-time data availability.
Performed in-depth exploratory data analysis on agent performance, lead funnels, schedule rates, and user behaviour patterns.
Developed interactive dashboards to track KPIs such as contractibility, schedule rate, SV timelines, QA trends, and productivity metrics.
Unified CRM and dialer data into structured analytical models, improving data accuracy and reporting consistency.
Analyzed lead flow patterns, drop-offs, and conversion bottlenecks and shared insights with leadership to improve funnel performance.

keyProjects.title: Automated Reporting & Dashboarding
keyProjects.description: Designed and implemented automated SQL-driven reporting pipelines and dashboards for operations and leadership teams.
keyProjects.impact: Reduced manual reporting effort and improved decision turnaround time

keyProjects.title: Lead Funnel & Conversion Analysis
keyProjects.description: Conducted RCA on contractibility and drop-off issues using EDA techniques.
keyProjects.impact: Improved operational visibility and conversion outcomes

roles.title: Account Manager
roles.summary: Managed high-value NRI accounts while applying data-driven insights to improve conversions and customer experience.
responsibilities: Handled high-value NRI property accounts and listings.
Analyzed call performance and lead quality to improve monthly conversion rates.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to optimize lead handling and customer experience.

roles.title: Unit Head
roles.summary: Led a sales unit with a strong focus on performance metrics, coaching, and revenue optimization.
responsibilities: Led a sales team to achieve approximately 15% month-over-month growth in conversions.
Mentored team members through call analysis and performance reviews.
Collaborated with senior leadership to align sales strategies with business goals.

roles.title: Business Development Executive
roles.summary: Provided tailored real estate solutions for NRI clients and consistently exceeded sales targets.
responsibilities: Delivered customized real estate solutions for NRI tenants and buyers.
Consistently exceeded monthly sales targets, achieving up to 232% performance.
Recognized as top performer for six consecutive months.
